name: NordSym AB
description: NordSym designs, builds, and operates the governed operating layer between a company's existing software stack and the AI agents that run recurring business operations.

category_frame.name: Agent architecture and operations
category_frame.definition: NordSym installs the layer that gives agents context, mandate, approval boundaries, records, and safe access to the stack a client already runs.

agent.name: Symbot
boundaries: No external communications without human approval
No production changes without explicit operator approval

services.name: Operating Review
services.description: A structured review of where governed agents can operate inside an existing company stack.

services.name: Operating Layer Build
services.description: Governed agent infrastructure inside an existing stack, with approvals, stop controls, and records.

systems.name: APIClaw
systems.description: API and provider gateway for agents.

systems.name: Agent Badge
systems.description: Identity and receipts for agent work. The current operator surface lives inside Mission Control.

systems.name: AI Search
systems.description: Checks how AI systems find, read, and cite a company.

systems.name: GenPRD
systems.description: Turns a product idea into a build-ready product requirements document.

systems.name: FlowVault
systems.description: Workflow library and reliability layer for n8n operations.

systems.name: CleanBuddy
systems.description: Operations surface for cleaning companies, built and operated by NordSym for a venture company.
